query: DELETE FROM recebimentos_excel WHERE arquivo_id IN (SELECT id FROM arquivos WHERE nome LIKE '%Demostrativo 12-2025%' AND convenioId IN (SELECT id FROM convenios WHERE nome = 'Vivacom'));
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute DELETE FROM recebimentos_excel WHERE arquivo_id IN (SELECT id FROM arquivos WHERE nome LIKE '%Demostrativo 12-2025%' AND convenioId IN (SELECT id FROM convenios WHERE nome = 'Vivacom'));
